title: Transport machinery
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Transport machinery demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Load machines

pcs.text: Confirm activity to be undertaken, including identifying potential hazards and risks and implementing safe workplace procedures for transporting machinery and managing risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm activity to be undertaken, including identifying potential hazards and risks and implementing safe workplace procedures for transporting machinery and managing risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm activity to be undertaken, including identifying potential hazards and risks and implementing safe workplace procedures for transporting machinery and managing risks.
